code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> STARTUP

    STARTUP --> POSITION_RECOVERY: Initialize Agent

    state POSITION_RECOVERY {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] --> QueryPlatform
        QueryPlatform --> ExtractPositions: get_portfolio_breakdown
        ExtractPositions --> GenerateSyntheticDecisions: Found N positions
        GenerateSyntheticDecisions --> RebuildMemory: Create decision records
        RebuildMemory --> AssociateMonitor: Populate PortfolioMemoryEngine
        AssociateMonitor --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: Mark startup_complete

        QueryPlatform --> RetryBackoff: Failure
        RetryBackoff --> QueryPlatform: Exponential delay
        QueryPlatform --> ForceComplete: Max retries
        ForceComplete --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: Continue with empty state
    }

    POSITION_RECOVERY --> IDLE: Recovery Complete

    state IDLE {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> WaitInterval
        WaitInterval --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: After analysis_frequency_seconds
    }

    IDLE --> LEARNING: Timer Expires

    state LEARNING {HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> FetchClosedTrades
        FetchClosedTrades --> ProcessOutcomes: get_closed_trades
        ProcessOutcomes --> RecordMemory: PortfolioMemoryEngine
        RecordMemory --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: Update experience
    }

    LEARNING --> PERCEPTION

    state PERCEPTION {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> FetchPortfolio
        FetchPortfolio --> KillSwitchCheck: get_portfolio_breakdown
        KillSwitchCheck --> DailyReset: P&L within limits
        DailyReset --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: Reset trade count

        KillSwitchCheck --> HALT: P&L breached
    }

    PERCEPTION --> REASONING

    state REASONING {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> LoopAssets
        LoopAssets --> AnalyzeAsset: For each asset
        AnalyzeAsset --> RetryLogic: generate_decision
        RetryLogic --> CheckAction: Success
        CheckAction --> NextAsset: HOLD
        CheckAction --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]: BUY/SELL

        RetryLogic --> ExponentialBackoff: Failure
        ExponentialBackoff --> AnalyzeAsset: Retry
        ExponentialBackoff --> MarkFailure: Max retries
        MarkFailure --> NextAsset: Skip

        NextAsset --> LoopAssets: More assets
        NextAsset --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: All processed
    }

    REASONING --> RISK_CHECK: Actionable
    REASONING --> IDLE: No Action

    state RISK_CHECK {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] --> GetMonitoringContext
        GetMonitoringContext --> ValidateTrade: RiskGatekeeper
        ValidateTrade --> [HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]: Approved
        ValidateTrade --> [HealthTech_PatientRecords]: Denied
    }

    RISK_CHECK --> EXECUTION: Approved
    RISK_CHECK --> PERCEPTION: Rejected

    state EXECUTION {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> SendOrder
        SendOrder --> AssociateDecision: execute_trade
        AssociateDecision --> IncrementCounter: TradeMonitor
        IncrementCounter --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: daily_trade_count++

        SendOrder --> LogFailure: Error
        LogFailure --> EXECUTION_FAILED
    }

    EXECUTION --> LEARNING: Executed
    EXECUTION_FAILED --> PERCEPTION: Retry

    state HALT {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> StopAgent
        StopAgent --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: is_running = False
    }

    HALT --> [HealthTech_LabAnalyzer]: Agent Stopped

    style STARTUP fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style POSITION_RECOVERY fill:#00BCD4,stroke:#006064,color:#fff
    style IDLE fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#424242,color:#fff
    style LEARNING fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style PERCEPTION fill:#2196F3,stroke:#0D47A1,color:#fff
    style REASONING fill:#FF9800,stroke:#E65100,color:#fff
    style RISK_CHECK fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
    style EXECUTION fill:#9C27B0,stroke:#4A148C,color:#fff
    style HALT fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style EXECUTION_FAILED fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为诊断引擎设计一个完整的状态机，核心是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。启动后要先进入POSITION_RECOVERY，这个状态里需要处理仓位恢复的各种场景，包括失败重试和强制完成。
明白。POSITION_RECOVERY内部需要哪些具体步骤？我看到有QueryPlatform、ExtractPositions这些，还有RetryBackoff和ForceComplete两个异常分支，对吗？

对。正常流程是QueryPlatform获取portfolio_breakdown，然后ExtractPositions，找到N个仓位后GenerateSyntheticDecisions生成决策记录，RebuildMemory重建内存，最后AssociateMonitor标记startup_complete。失败时走RetryBackoff做exponential backoff重试，超过最大次数则ForceComplete，以空状态继续到HealthTech_PatientRecords。
好的，POSITION_RECOVERY结构已绘制。恢复完成后进入IDLE状态，里面有个WaitInterval等待analysis_frequency_seconds，对吗？
没错。IDLE之后进入LEARNING状态，这里关联HealthTech_EMR_Sync，需要获取已平仓交易来学习经验。FetchClosedTrades调用get_closed_trades，ProcessOutcomes处理结果，RecordMemory更新到PortfolioMemoryEngine。
LEARNING完成后进入PERCEPTION，由HealthTech_LabAnalyzer负责FetchPortfolio，然后KillSwitchCheck检查P&L是否在限制内。如果在限制内走DailyReset重置交易计数到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，否则直接HALT。
PERCEPTION之后是核心的REASONING状态，这是决策大脑。HealthTech_PatientRecords启动LoopAssets循环，对每个资产AnalyzeAsset生成决策。成功的话CheckAction判断是HOLD还是BUY/SELL，HOLD就NextAsset，BUY/SELL则输出到HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。
generate_decision失败的情况怎么处理？我看到有RetryLogic分支。
对，RetryLogic处理失败。走ExponentialBackoff延迟后重试AnalyzeAsset，如果超过最大次数就MarkFailure标记失败，然后NextAsset跳过这个资产。所有资产处理完回到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
REASONING的出边有两个：有Actionable的去RISK_CHECK，No Action的回IDLE。RISK_CHECK由HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault的GetMonitoringContext开始，RiskGatekeeper做ValidateTrade，Approved去EXECUTION，Denied回PERCEPTION。
EXECUTION是HealthTech_PatientRecords执行SendOrder，调用execute_trade，然后AssociateDecision关联决策，IncrementCounter增加TradeMonitor的daily_trade_count，最后回到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。但如果出错要LogFailure进入EXECUTION_FAILED。
EXECUTION正常完成去LEARNING学习这次交易，EXECUTION_FAILED则回PERCEPTION重试。HALT状态是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer执行StopAgent，设置is_running为False后回到自身标记Agent Stopped。
现在需要设置状态颜色。STARTUP和POSITION_RECOVERY用青色#00BCD4，IDLE用灰色#9E9E9E，LEARNING用绿色#4CAF50，PERCEPTION用蓝色#2196F3，REASONING用橙色#FF9800，RISK_CHECK用琥珀色#FFC107，EXECUTION用紫色#9C27B0，HALT和EXECUTION_FAILED用红色#F44336。
颜色样式已应用。我注意到RISK_CHECK的文字颜色需要是#333而不是白色，因为琥珀色背景上白色不够清晰。
同意，RISK_CHECK用深色文字。再检查一下：REASONING里的CheckAction到HealthTech_LabAnalyzer是BUY或SELL，这个输出方向对吗？
这里有个问题。CheckAction输出BUY/SELL到HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，但REASONING之后应该是到RISK_CHECK或IDLE，这个BUY/SELL输出似乎应该是决策信号而不是状态跳转。让我修正一下理解：CheckAction的BUY/SELL是内部决策标记，实际状态流转还是走REASONING的出边到RISK_CHECK。
正确，BUY/SELL是决策类型标记，不是状态跳转。状态机层面REASONING完成后统一走RISK_CHECK进行风控。另外确认一下DailyReset的daily_trade_count重置逻辑。
DailyReset在PERCEPTION内部，当P&L within limits时触发，重置到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。而EXECUTION里的IncrementCounter也是增加daily_trade_count，这两个操作对象一致但时机不同，对吗？
对，DailyReset是每日重置，IncrementCounter是每笔交易增加。还有ExponentialBackoff的延迟逻辑，POSITION_RECOVERY和REASONING里都有，但REASONING里的是针对单个资产重试，POSITION_RECOVERY里是针对整个查询重试。
已区分两个重试机制。最后确认HALT状态：KillSwitchCheck发现P&L breached时进入，StopAgent设置is_running=False，最终标记Agent Stopped回到HealthTech_LabAnalyzer。整个状态机闭环完成。
完整了。再检查一遍颜色：HALT和EXECUTION_FAILED都是红色#F44336，stroke用#C62828；REASONING橙色#FF9800配#E65100；RISK_CHECK琥珀色#FFC107配#F57C00。所有状态清晰可辨。
全部确认。状态机从STARTUP经POSITION_RECOVERY、IDLE、LEARNING、PERCEPTION、REASONING、RISK_CHECK到EXECUTION，异常分支到EXECUTION_FAILED或HALT，学习闭环回LEARNING，完整覆盖诊断引擎生命周期。
